itinerary.title: Singapore & Melbourne Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Marina Bay Sands • Gardens by the Bay • Melbourne Laneways • Great Ocean Road • Phillip Island 07 Nights / 08 Days Grand Singapore & Australia Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-004 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-MEL-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore & Australia CATEGORY: Premium Family Tour Package DURATION: 07 Nights / 08 Days Singapore (3N) + Melbourne (4N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Embark on a magnificent multi-country family expedition with our TRAGUIN curated Singapore & Australia explorer package. Connecting the futuristic metropolitan marvels of Singapore with the artistic culture and wild coastlines of Melbourne, this itinerary creates a harmonious blend of adventure, discovery, and unforgettable memories for your family. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: SG-004 | Singapore & Melbourne Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Singapore package (SG-004 / TRG-SIN-MEL-2026): Marina Bay Sands • Gardens by the Bay • Melbourne Laneways • Great Ocean Road • with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & MARINA BAY
Day 02: GARDENS BY THE BAY EXPLORATION

days.title: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & MARINA BAY
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your premium hotel. Spend the evening exploring the breathtaking Marina Bay area, enjoying the spectacular light shows.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GARDENS BY THE BAY EXPLORATION
days.description: Full day at Gardens by the Bay, discovering the Cloud Forest and Flower Dome. A top-tier family experience in Singapore.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SINGAPORE FAMILY LEISURE
days.description: A relaxing day with family-friendly activities like Sentosa Island's beaches and attractions—creating wonderful, unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO MELBOURNE
days.description: Private transfer to the airport for your flight to Melbourne. Check into your city-centre luxury family hotel.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MELBOURNE LANES & ARTS
days.description: Private guided walking tour through Melbourne's world-famous street-art laneways and vibrant culture centres.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GREAT OCEAN ROAD EXPEDITION
days.description: Exhilarating full-day adventure along the Great Ocean Road, witnessing the dramatic breathtaking landscapes of the Twelve Apostles.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PHILLIP ISLAND WILDLIFE GALA
days.description: Journey to Phillip Island to watch the native wildlife and the famous Penguin Parade—a highlight for the entire family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium multi- country family expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
